prompt:
Take the FIRST provided reference image (the v9 approved step 17 — hand from upper-left lowering the protector tube into the DH-branded zip-seal specimen bag with QR code) and reproduce it PIXEL-FAITHFULLY in EVERY element — same hand pose, same bag silhouette, same parted zip seal, same DIALED HEALTH bag-front logo, same QR code, same tube size and proportions, same composition, same line-art style on pure white background, same line weight, same outlined line-art letter treatment.

DO NOT change the tube size or position. DO NOT change anything except the text orientation on the tube.

>>> THE TEXT ON THE TUBE IS PRINTED UPSIDE DOWN IN THE REFERENCE IMAGE. <<<

In the reference image, the letters spelling DIALED on the black cap and the letters spelling HEALTH on the white body are PHYSICALLY INVERTED — each letter is upside-down, and the letter sequence is reversed. Reading top-down on the cap currently shows: D (upside-down), E (upside-down), L (upside-down), A (upside-down), I (upside-down), D (upside-down) — which spells 'DELAID' top-down, NOT 'DIALED'. Reading top-down on the body currently shows: H (upside-down), T (upside-down), L (upside-down), A (upside-down), E (upside-down), H (upside-down) — which spells 'HTLAEH' top-down, NOT 'HEALTH'.

FLIP each text band 180° (rotate each word a half-turn) so each letter is now RIGHT-SIDE UP and the letter sequence reads forward when scanning top-down. Required final result:

  • BLACK CAP (top section): the word 'DIALED' rendered as a vertical column of 6 RIGHT-SIDE-UP capital letters, stacked top-to-bottom. From the very top of the cap downward, the letters appear in this exact sequence: D (topmost), then I, then A, then L, then E, then D (bottommost, just above the cap/body seam). Each letter is upright (not upside-down, not mirrored). When a viewer reads the cap top-down, they read: D-I-A-L-E-D = 'DIALED' forward. Outlined thin white strokes against the solid-black cap (line-art embossed look, letter interior remains black).

  • WHITE BODY (bottom section, lower portion faint through the bag): the word 'HEALTH' rendered as a vertical column of 6 RIGHT-SIDE-UP capital letters, stacked top-to-bottom. From the top of the body downward, the letters appear in this exact sequence: H (topmost, just below the cap/body seam), then E, then A, then L, then T, then H (bottommost, near the body's base). Each letter upright. Reading top-down: H-E-A-L-T-H = 'HEALTH' forward. Outlined thin black strokes against the white body (line-art embossed look, letter interior remains white).

  • Combined top-down reading: DIALED (cap) → HEALTH (body) = 'DIALED HEALTH' linearly top-down, correctly spelled forward, with each letter right-side-up.

The required change vs the reference is purely the 180° rotation of each text band: every letter that was upside-down becomes right-side-up, and the letter sequence that was running 'DELAID' top-down now runs 'DIALED' top-down (likewise 'HTLAEH' → 'HEALTH'). Same letter shapes, same outline style, same band position on the tube — just rotated 180° in place.

The SECOND reference image is the real product photo (protector tube top.png) showing the assembled tube with the correct embossed text orientation in the real product — use it to confirm the desired right-side-up letter orientation.

Do NOT modify anything else — same hand, same bag, same zip seal, same bag-front DH logo, same QR code, same tube size and proportions, same composition, same line weight, same white background, same line-art aesthetic. The ONLY change is the 180° rotation of the embossed text on the tube so the letters read DIALED and HEALTH forward top-down with each letter upright.

No frame, no border, no other labels, no numbers, no arrows.
refImages: DIaled Health Instruction Graphics/Product Refs/protector tube top.png
